'''Tracton''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] who served as an assistant to [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Tikkes/Legends|Tikkes]] of [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A scientist, Tracton had a great understanding of planetary ecosystems, meteorology, and mineralogy. [[Tikkes/Legends|Tikkes]] wanted Tracton to analyze the [[The Dark Woman|Dark Woman's]] [[Unidentified jungle world (Kamdon system)|residing world's]] minerals for financial worth. During this travel, Tikkes and Tracton were accompanied by three [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]—[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]], [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]], and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Darth Krayt|A'Sharad Hett]].

When Tikkes's party arrived on the designated planet, Tracton analyzed the planet's environment using a sensor scan. Tracton started providing Tikkes with data on one of the planet's peculiar events—the annual meteor shower that devastated the planet—and how the planet could restore itself quickly from the destruction due to special nutrients.

[[File:Tracton_death.png|thumb|left|200px|Tracton (far left) is killed by Aurra Sing in front of A'Sharad Hett and Tikkes.]]

During his scans and gathering of data, Tracton noticed that there were other interesting minerals on this world. A'Sharad Hett managed to recognize one of the minerals as [[Quald Runium]]. Tracton was impressed by the Padawan, but expressed disrespect by calling Hett a "savage" and showing surprise that a [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] could be trained.

When [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] [[Hunt for Aurra Sing|attacked]], Ki-Adi-Mundi instructed A'Sharad Hett to get Tikkes, Tracton, and the other Quarren on the ship and guard them. Unfortunately, the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] managed to infiltrate Tikkes's ceremonial ship and attempted to kill all on board. Before any chance of reaction, Tracton and a Quarren soldier next to him were killed with one shot from behind by the assassin. Tracton was shot in the back of his head.
